[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000111100 4
1 010000110 3
2 110000000 2
3 110010110 5
4 100010001 3
5 011101001 5
6 110000100 3
7 000111100 4

01 011111111 8
12 111101001 6
23 111111110 8
34 100010111 5
45 011111011 7
56 111000111 6
67 110111100 6
70 101111111 8

02 011111001 6
13 111101110 7
24 110010110 5 match 3
35 101111011 7
46 111101011 7
57 110100100 4
60 100111110 6
71 001111111 7

03 011111111 8
14 110010110 5 match 3
25 111111111 a
36 111010011 6
47 111101001 6
50 110100110 5
61 001111111 7
72 001111111 7

04 111011111 8
15 111111011 8
26 111010111 7
37 110110001 5
40 111101111 8
51 111111111 a
62 001111101 6
73 011111111 8

05 011111011 7

27 110110110 6
30 100110111 6
41 011111111 8

06 111011011 7
